title: M-01: Config Schema & Validation — Implement Pydantic schemas with 3-layer validation
body:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] DataConfig, MDPConfig, ActionSpec, RewardWeights, AgentConfig, ExperimentConfig defined as Pydantic models
- [ ] YAML → Pydantic loading pipeline implemented
- [ ] 3-layer validation: schema → registry → dummy step
- [ ] Invalid configs rejected with clear error messages
- [ ] Example config files for synthetic data experiments
- [ ] `uv run ty check` passes with concrete types

## Definition of Done
All config types validated from YAML; 3-layer validation catches wiring errors before experiment starts.

## Source
subphase_1a_data_layer.md, subphase_1b_mdp_environment.md, subphase_1d_agent_library.md, subphase_1e_experiment_runner.md

title: M-02: StateView & Environment — Implement StateView dataclass and Environment with step/reset API
body:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] StateView dataclass with features dict, user_id, timestamp, metadata
- [ ] StateView.from_dataset(dataset, user_idx, t) classmethod
- [ ] Environment class with step(state, action) → (StateView, float, bool)
- [ ] Environment.reset() → StateView
- [ ] Multi-timescale reward accumulator (immediate + 3-week delayed)
- [ ] Episode termination logic
- [ ] Environment tests pass

## Definition of Done
Environment.step() returns correctly typed StateView; reward includes both components at correct epochs.

## Source
subphase_1b_mdp_environment.md, code_design.md, initial_design.tex §3

title: M-03: Transition & Reward Models — Implement RuleBasedTransition and CompoundReward
body:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] RuleBasedTransition implements behavioural response model
- [ ] CompoundReward implements multi-timescale reward
- [ ] Burden accumulation/decay logic
- [ ] Configurable reward weights (α, β, λ, η) and action penalties
- [ ] Transition and reward tests pass

## Definition of Done
Transition model produces state changes; burden accumulates/decays correctly; compound reward computes both components.

## Source
subphase_1b_mdp_environment.md, initial_design.tex §3.2, §3.3

title: M-04: User Simulation Engine — Implement UserProfile with 4 archetypes
body:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] UserProfile Pydantic schema
- [ ] RuleBasedResponse with archetype-specific responses
- [ ] 4 archetypes: goal-driven, social responder, resistant, stable maintainer
- [ ] Parameter ranges for each archetype
- [ ] Response model tests pass

## Definition of Done
4 archetypes produce distinct response patterns; burden threshold triggers response decay.

## Source
subphase_1c_user_simulation.md, initial_design.tex §3.2

title: M-05: Thompson Sampling Agent — Implement full TS algorithm
body:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] ThompsonSamplingAgent with Gaussian/Beta TS
- [ ] Configurable prior parameters and exploration rate
- [ ] Agent.select_action(state) returns valid action
- [ ] Agent.update() updates posterior
- [ ] Regret decreases on bandit problem
- [ ] Agent tests pass

## Definition of Done
Agent implements full TS algorithm; regret decreases ≥20% over 1000 episodes.

## Source
subphase_1d_agent_library.md

title: M-06: Experiment Runner & CLI — Implement end-to-end experiment execution
body:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] ExperimentFactory.build(config) → Experiment
- [ ] Experiment.run() → ExperimentResult
- [ ] CLI with --config flag
- [ ] ExperimentResult with config snapshot, agent results, seeds
- [ ] Results output: console table + CSV/JSON
- [ ] Reproducibility: same config + seed → identical results
- [ ] Integration tests pass

## Definition of Done
`uv run rl-health-interventions --config experiment.yml` runs end-to-end; results saved.

## Source
subphase_1e_experiment_runner.md, code_design.md

title: M-07: Synthetic Data Pipeline — Complete multi-feature synthetic data generation
body:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] SyntheticDataGenerator produces steps, HR, sleep, sedentary time
- [ ] Population statistics from NHANES, All of Us, UK Biobank
- [ ] Distribution parameters configurable
- [ ] Synthetic data validation tests
- [ ] Example synthetic dataset

## Definition of Done
Synthetic data statistical properties within 10% of published population stats.

## Source
subphase_1a_data_layer.md, initial_design.tex §5

title: M-08: Evaluation Framework — Define baselines, metrics, and statistical analysis
body:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Baseline agents: random, fixed, rule-based
- [ ] Metrics: regret, reward, adherence, sustained change
- [ ] Statistical analysis: bootstrap CIs, effect sizes
- [ ] Power analysis document
- [ ] Evaluation tests pass

## Definition of Done
≥3 baselines implemented; statistical power ≥80% for 10% improvement detection.

## Source
Derived from Phase 1 gap analysis

title: M-09: Documentation & Examples — Complete API docs and example configs
body:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Sphinx/mkdocs setup with auto-generated API docs
- [ ] 3 example experiment configs
- [ ] README with architecture diagram and working quickstart
- [ ] CONTRIBUTING.md updated
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md created

## Definition of Done
API docs cover 100% of public APIs; 3 example configs tested; README quickstart works.

## Source
Derived from Phase 2 doc-alignment audit

title: M-10: Safety & Ethics Review — Add safety constraints and privacy documentation
body:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Hard safety constraints: max intervention frequency, min recovery, burden limits
- [ ] Safety violation logging
- [ ] Privacy documentation: GDPR/HIPAA compliance
- [ ] Ethics section in initial_design.tex
- [ ] Safety tests pass

## Definition of Done
100% of safety constraints enforced; privacy docs cover all Phase 2 datasets.

## Source
Derived from Phase 1 gap analysis
